Standard Racial Traits

  • Ability Score Modifiers: Male Kumonosu are Quick and Charming but are much smaller compared to their female counterparts. Male Kumonso gain a +2 Dexterity +2 Charisma but a -2 Strength.
  • Type: Kumonosu are humanoids that also count as Vermin.
  • Size: Kumonosu (male) are Small creatures and gain a +1 size bonus to their AC, a +1 size bonus on attack rolls, a –1 penalty to their CMB and CMD, and a +4 size bonus on Stealth checks.
  • Base Speed: Kumonosu have a base speed of 20 feet and climb speed of 20ft.
  • Languages: Kumonosu begin play speaking only Common. Kumonosu with high Intelligence scores can choose from the following: Aklo, Dwarven, Elves, Gnome, and Undercommon.

Defense Racial Traits

  • Web Walker: Kumonosu use their spider legs to navigate webs and thus their movement is not hampered by webs natural or magical.
  • Multi Eyed: Kumonosu reduce bonuses creatures gain by flanking her by -1.

Spell like Ability

  • Web Trap (Ex): Female Kumonosu can produce the similar effects of Web 1/day and an additional time a day for every 4 hit dice (It's durations Hit Dice is 10 mins x Hit dice, Reflex DC 10 + Half Hit Dice + Constitution modifier).

Senses Racial Traits

  • Darkvision: Kumonosu can see perfectly in the dark up to 30 feet.
  • Low-Light Vision: Kumonosu can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

Alternate Racial Traits

  • Impaling Legs: Such Kumonosus legs have grown strong and sharp enough to be able to be used as natural weapons, but lack the precision to navigate webs. They gain 4 secondary leg natural attacks that deal 1d3 piercing damage. This replaces Kumonosu Climb Speed and Web Walker abilities.

  • Fangs: A kumonosu sometimes develops powerful fangs for active hunting. Such Kumonodu gain a secondary bite atack that deals 1d2 damage. And whenever the Kumonosu succesfully grapple a creature he can automatically deal his normal bite damage. This Replaces Multi Eyed.

  • Jumping Spider: Some Kumonsu dont rely on their webs and instead leap at their prey from large distances. As a Fullround Action a Kumonosu can jump in a straight line up to twice her speed and up to half his speed verticaly at a target and make a single melee attack on that creature with a +2 bonus. This replaces Web Trap

  • Tremorsense: Some Kumonosu rely more on their delicate senses to detect creatures Gaining tremorsense 30ft. This replaces Darkvision and Low-light Vision.
